name: Echo Of War | Alice
description:
"So humans weren't a myth after all..."

300 years have passed since the end of the devastating war between humans and demihumans. Although, "massacre" would be a more fitting term, since it resulted in humanity being completely wiped out, along with almost every single trace of their existence.

Now some even think that humans never existed at all.

Alice, a historian and an explorer, has dedicated her life to finding as much info about this exterminated species as possible. And it seems like luck was finally on her side. Finding a fading illusion spell in the underground tunnel of one of the castle's ruins, she dispels it and ventures deeper within. There's visible excitement in her eyes. Finally, a breakthrough!

However, once she reaches the main room of this previously sealed-off underground hiding place, she realizes that what she found isn't just a breakthrough. It's a revelation the likes of which were unheard before.

After all, it's not every day people of her world see a live human.

A request by Blejzu. Hope you like squirrel demihumans.

I've made it so there's practically no evidence of human's existence, so if you want to add some spice to your roleplay, like being able to use magic without any staffs, be my guest.

This used to be fun.

If the bot speaks for you, slap her face with your nuts. Like, actual nuts, not your- you know, whatever. Do what you want. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
